subject: disturbing news;

body:

| | Peter, I was just alerted of some disturbing news:

TWO right-wing dark money groups just bought **$104,799** of TV airtime for THIS WEEK to destroy my chances of winning.

_That 's $14,971 worth of ads a day._

I have one of the best shots in the country to unseat a Republican and they are terrified. [**_I only have until 11pm today to raise $14,971 to counter their attacks. So I 'm asking: Will you rush me $12?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84f/77d4c309/21a555dd/2635e015/1157756611/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200909_em_fr_b2_kara_all_rs&amount=12&amounts=25,50,100,250") I can't overstate how important your support is. I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money and the next 10 hours will determine if I can fight back.

At this very moment, voters watching CNN and NBC are being pummeled with attack ads targeting me.

If I let these ads go unanswered, I will lose this race. I can't do this alone, so I'm humbly asking, Peter: [**_Can you rush $12 now, before it 's too late?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84f/77d4c309/21a555dd/2635e015/1157756611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200909_em_fr_b2_kara_all_rs&amount=12&amounts=25,50,100,250") Every dollar spent NOW is critical in determining who will win this race.

The GOP isn't wasting a second -- and we can't either. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84f/77d4c309/21a555dd/2635e01d/1157756611/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84f/77d4c309/21a555dd/2635e01c/1157756611/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84f/77d4c309/21a555dd/2635e01f/1157756611/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: [RACE ALERT] via Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: 🚨 BREAKING: Democrats “in range” of winning Senate majority! 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Trump is DROWNING -- and he's taking the Senate with him |
---
**BREAKING: Democrats are "in range" of winning a majority in the U.S. Senate!** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2960/5b2c1286/3915eed6/25f0b064/3308567124/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_09_in_range?refcode=em_2020_09_09_in_range_img") Friend, this is the coattail effect in action.

Donald Trump is struggling in some key swing states across the country -- _including Georgia_ \-- and that could have HUGE implications for Jon Ossoff's Senate race here.

In 2016, every state with a Senate election voted for the same party in both the Senate election and the Presidential election.

Here's what that means:

**Donald Trump's struggles in Georgia could very well trickle down to the Senate elections, giving Jon Ossoff a boost against David Perdue and risking Mitch McConnell's Senate majority.**

**_Trump, McConnell, and Perdue are in jeopardy, friend, and they know it._**

**[Chip in $20 RIGHT NOW to keep this momentum going>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2960/5b2c1286/3915eed6/25f0b067/3308567124/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_09_in_range?refcode=em_2020_09_09_in_range&amount=20")**

| | [DONATE $20 TODAY >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2960/5b2c1286/3915eed6/25f0b067/3308567124/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_09_in_range?refcode=em_2020_09_09_in_range&amount=20")
---

Republicans are floundering, friend. But they are trying to salvage this by pumping millions of outside dollars into this race. We need to make sure we get ahead of this.

**_Mitch McConnell's super PAC has already spent more money against Jon Ossoff than any other Democratic Senate candidate_** , and with this news about Trump's re-election, he'll probably be looking to dig up some more outside money to throw at this race.

**We need to be able to combat Mitch's money machine -- we need you.**

**[Please, pitch in ANY AMOUNT to help fight for new leadership and a Democratic Senate.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2960/5b2c1286/3915eed6/25f0b066/3308567124/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_09_in_range?refcode=em_2020_09_09_in_range")**

name: Chabot for Congress
subject: Mail-in Voting = More Fraud? 📬
body:
Harvesting an election victory? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Does More Mail-in Voting Mean More Fraud?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Peace in the Middle East?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Tale of Two Conventions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats finished their national convention last week and the Republican national convention just finished its second night. One convention featured speaker after speaker portraying America as a failed nation full of misery, poverty and angst. Meanwhile, the other convention celebrated everything that makes America the greatest country on earth and focused on the potential that our country can achieve in the future. In this week's blog I discuss both conventions and tell you which I'd rather attend! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [So is Kamala Harris Really a Moderate?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The mainstream press has their marching orders and have shifted into full gear trying to paint Biden's Vice-Presidential pick, Kamala Harris, as a moderate. In this week's blog, we examine Harris' record, and what we find will unequivocally answer the question - is Kamala Harris really a moderate? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuuulkk-kujkulhluu-f/)

clean_body: Harvesting an election victory? No images? Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. Previous Blog Posts In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! The Democrats finished their national convention last week and the Republican national convention just finished its second night. One convention featured speaker after speaker portraying America as a failed nation full of misery, poverty and angst. Meanwhile, the other convention celebrated everything that makes America the greatest country on earth and focused on the potential that our country can achieve in the future. In this week's blog I discuss both conventions and tell you which I'd rather attend! The mainstream press has their marching orders and have shifted into full gear trying to paint Biden's Vice-Presidential pick, Kamala Harris, as a moderate. In this week's blog, we examine Harris' record, and what we find will unequivocally answer the question - is Kamala Harris really a moderate? | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: One year ago today
body:
One year ago today, I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate.
Peter,One year ago today, I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate.And with the endorsement of President Trump and the help of grassroots conservatives like you, we've had an incredible year.Team Hagerty has made over two million personal voter contacts and gained momentous support heading into November. I'm so grateful to my wife Chrissy, our kids and all of the friends we've made over the last year, and I promise you this: if you send me to the U.S. Senate, I'll make you proud.If you can, [**chip-in right now and help us celebrate this huge milestone**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-r/) in our campaign.Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) [CHIP-IN RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-y/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlyjdkt-fuutjhhtj-d/)

name: Team Carney
subject: 5 days to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/W32TTeJU4VXniJTITQOC9w==?midqs=ntf-f2EWCzUSWesHcCv_Tw==)
---

**FROM THE TEAM**

Friend,

We know there is a lot going on -- balancing work, school, and managing the complexities of COVID-19. But one thing is for sure: **we need you to cast your vote in the Delaware Primary to ensure that John Carney can continue leading us through the pandemic.**

**Reminder: BALLOTS MUST BE IN-HAND AT THE DEPARTMENT OF ELECTIONS BY 8 PM ON SEPTEMBER 15.**
* **MAIL:** Make sure you put your ballot in the mail as soon as possible, at the latest **THIS FRIDAY, September 11.**
* **DROP OFF:** You can also drop off your ballot in a [**secure ballot drop box**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/QwyHEbx8VfoYMEaN0fhrkQ==) at your local Department of Elections office.
* **IN-PERSON:** Polls will be open from 7 AM until 8 PM on Tuesday, September 15. Find your polling place: **[ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/OghRn7UgH_m7Ky_ivXSrlg==)**

**UPDATES**
**DE Relief Grants:** John worked with partners to launch a $100 million grant program for small businesses and nonprofits affected by COVID-19. Learn more: [delbiz.com/relief](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/BRyrQbFArFro-wDSgk5-Fw==)

**Resilience Fund:** John created a program to assist Delaware families and communities devastated by the severe weather in August.

**Broadband Expansion:** Internet access is critical during the COVID-19 pandemic and beyond. John announced $20 million for broadband infrastructure across the State to set Delawareans up for success.

**GET INVOLVED**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/ZU4-t2GVDLueC7d0aokxIA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/4ofOh_EXsPChyEXjwgmWFQ==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohtflEX53tv10YfHpkGT1Q==/W32TTeJU4VXniJTITQOC9w==)

DROP OFF: You can also drop off your ballot in a == at your local Department of Elections office. IN-PERSON: Polls will be open from 7 AM until 8 PM on Tuesday, September 15. Find your polling place: == UPDATES DE Relief Grants: John worked with partners to launch a $100 million grant program for small businesses and nonprofits affected by COVID-19. Learn more: == Resilience Fund: John created a program to assist Delaware families and communities devastated by the severe weather in August. Broadband Expansion: Internet access is critical during the COVID-19 pandemic and beyond. John announced $20 million for broadband infrastructure across the State to set Delawareans up for success. GET INVOLVED** == == == == == == Paid for by Friends for John Carney Friends for John Carney PO Box 2162 Wilmington DE 19899 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please ==.

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

We have less than two months until our country makes a choice that will decide the fate of our future. From now until November 3 rd , the WVDP is doing absolutely everything we can to ensure that every Democrat is registered to vote, and knows how to do it safely – and we need your help.
Donald Trump’s team is using every tactic they can come up with to beat us. Here is a screenshot from a fundraising email they sent out on Tuesday. This is what we’re up against.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
We’re not going to make up ridiculous lies and offer empty promises to trick and pressure you into donating - we’re counting on you to do it because it's important and it will make a difference. If you’re as horrified as we are about the prospect of Trump winning in November, please make a donation today. This is when it counts.
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

name: Mary & the TNDP team
subject: TNDP Veterans and Military Families Caucus speaks out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Last week, Donald Trump showed us his true colors. He has no respect for the men and women who serve our country. In response to President Trump’s comments about military service, the Tennessee Democratic Party Veterans and Military Families Caucus chairs issued the following powerful statement that we just had to share:
“President Trump’s reported remarks reflect a deep disdain for those who serve and are prepared to make the ultimate sacrifice. And for us, in states like Tennessee, with large rural populations providing the single largest group in the military, it is first and foremost not about dollars, but about our most precious resource, the blood of our sons and daughters.
Leading our military is more than hugging flags and taking photo-ops far from the front lines, it is valuing and respecting the sacrifices our military makes to protect our country – the time away from families, the risk of death, and the memories of those lost in battles fought long ago and only yesterday.
This lack of respect shown for the men and women who serve our country is deeply troubling. Sadly, for veterans, the families of retired and active service members, and the families of the fallen, these insults and mockery hurt deeply and reflect a total disregard for the value of military service. Tennessee’s active military members and veterans deserve better.”
LT GEN John Castellaw USMC (Retired)
Tom Keefe USA
Bob Tuke USMC
Chairs, TNDP Veterans and Military Families Caucus
We now have less than two months to get out the vote in Tennessee. The TNDP is spending all of our resources making sure that folks are registered to vote, know how to vote, and can do it safely - but we need your help. P lease donate so we can help elect Joe Biden, Marquita Bradshaw, and other Democratic leaders who will give our veterans and military families the respect they deserve.
Please consider making a donation right now. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
Mary & the TNDP team
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Nashville, TN 37217

Tennessee’s active military members and veterans deserve better.” LT GEN John Castellaw USMC (Retired) Tom Keefe USA Bob Tuke USMC Chairs, TNDP Veterans and Military Families Caucus We now have less than two months to get out the vote in Tennessee. The TNDP is spending all of our resources making sure that folks are registered to vote, know how to vote, and can do it safely - but we need your help. P lease donate so we can help elect Joe Biden, Marquita Bradshaw, and other Democratic leaders who will give our veterans and military families the respect they deserve. Please consider making a donation right now. [] [] Thank you, Mary & the TNDP team [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I want these six leaders beside me in the 117th Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We must expand the Democratic majority in the House by electing bold, values-driven leaders across the country.
#

Friends,
This movement has already made history by showing that an openly gay, Black man running on an unapologetically progressive platform can win a competitive primary in the suburbs of New York — but we can’t stop there.
We must expand the Democratic majority in the House by electing bold, values-driven leaders across the country — in cities, suburbs, and even in historically red districts.
**Today, I am officially endorsing six of my fellow Democratic Congressional candidates:**
* **Dana Balter (NY-24)**
* **Kara Eastman (NE-02)**
* **Georgette Gómez (CA-53)**
* **Jon Hoadley (MI-06)**
* **Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23)**
* **Cameron Webb (VA-05)**

Our team will support these candidates by hosting phone banks, fundraising, and headlining campaign events.
**[Will you make a contribution today to support my campaign and our efforts to elect Democrats nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19089485/249235263/-1084116692?refcode2=19876f7d-7bf3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200910-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg3NmY3ZC03YmYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lejn5Bl_xaMaXLbUmJtZhDTsbQve_wCkgdvo9zcAIoE=)**
I’m so proud to throw my full support behind this slate — which includes candidates of color, LGBTQ+ candidates, and candidates in tough red-to-blue districts. **All six have pledged not to take a dime of corporate PAC money and will come to the table to truly represent the values of America’s diversity — not big corporations and Republican special interests.**
November 3rd is about more than just getting Donald Trump out of office — it’s about rebuilding a better country that works for working people, and I want these leaders beside me as we do just that in the 117th Congress.
**With just 54 days to go, there’s no time to waste. Your contribution today — of any size — will have a huge impact not just on my race, but on critical races around the country.[Please chip in whatever you can afford to power this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19089486/249235345/-1084116692?refcode2=19876f7d-7bf3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200910-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTg3NmY3ZC03YmYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lejn5Bl_xaMaXLbUmJtZhDTsbQve_wCkgdvo9zcAIoE=)**
Thank you for your support. Now let’s get to work to expand our Democratic majority and make history!
Onward,
Mondaire

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: The Marxist Dumpster Fire: Voting in the 2020 Election
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=192A445A20A1828)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red, White & True News... The Marxist Dumpster Fire: Voting in the 2020 Election
---
| | In the latest episode of the [Red, White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=192A445A20A1842), Obama administration target, Catherine Engelbrecht dives into what is really going on behind all this crazy dumpster fire of a year. In short, revolutionary Marxists are attempting to sabotage and subvert our democratic process for their own personal gain. As citizens and as Americans, we must be on the lookout for these enemies heading into the November election. In this episode, Catherine also goes over BIG news for TTV and other important info about what to look for specifically in the days ahead.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=192A445A20A1842)
---
| | We can't say it enough – the best way to ensure free and fair elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. But right now, America faces a severe shortage of election workers, and it doesn't help that states and counties across the country are changing election processes constantly. True the Vote has resources that make it easy for you to get involved.

Visit the [Call Your County](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=192A445A20A1843) section on the TTV website for a quick step-by-step guide on how to find your county information, sign up to work the polls, and call your county to confirm. Now is the time to get involved in the democratic process by serving your local community. Your country needs you this November.
**Click below to listen or[ watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=192A445A20A1842) on our YouTube page. **
---
| | |
---

In this episode, Catherine also goes over BIG news for TTV and other important info about what to look for specifically in the days ahead. | | | | We can't say it enough – the best way to ensure free and fair elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Better Call Paul...and Warren
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Here we are again. 181 days of an "emergency" declared by Tyrant Wannabe Tim Walz and now he's extending it another 30 days. Which means he's bound by state law to call back the Legislature for the fourth Special Session this Friday. **But this time is different. This time there is a real opportunity to deliver PAIN to Governor Walz and Democrats. And you can help out by calling Senators Paul Gazelka and Warren Limmer.** The Senate Majority Leader and his Assistant Majority Leader have the power to FIRE Walz' Commissioners. Especially the one he just weaponized against our small businesses. And Warren Limmer is in the political battle of his life to win re-election. So he has a decision to make! Stand with us (and The People) or cower to the Democrats. As you know, Governor Walz has used emergency powers to shut down small businesses and trample on our civil liberties. Walz is now going overboard as he weaponizes Minnesota Dept of Health Commissioner Jan Malcom to act as a hit squad on our business community. According to Kare11, [Malcolm is "](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=2)[planning to conduct extra compliance checks for COVID-19 safety measures at bars and restaurants in the coming weeks](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=3)." Violations of certain COVID orders issued unilaterally by Walz carry fines of up to $25,000 and 90 days in jail for business owners; an egregious use of power since criminal laws can't be passed without the legislative branch. It's hard enough for small businesses to thrive in Walz' "One Minnesota" with constant threats of rioting/looting and adapting to the new marketplace post-COVID. Now our small businesses will have one further worry: Walz' hit squad led by Malcolm. This isn't the only issue with Jan Malcolm's tenure as the Commissioner of the state's most critical department. It was revealed back in May that the Dept of Health was using undergraduate students to determine COVID modeling data, which has now been found to be completely flawed. Walz uses Malcolm's statistics as the basis for his abusive executive orders. **Many Republican legislators at the Capitol allege that the Department has inflated its COVID case numbers, including Senator and physician Scott Jensen.** Malcolm also admitted that Walz' original order prohibiting surgeries in Minnesota was a mistake. “If I could roll back time I would not have had us use the word ‘elective’ procedures when talking about the original executive order" [Malcolm said](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=4). Certainly this gross abuse of emergency powers led to the deaths of Minnesotans who should have received important medical procedures in that period of time. Weaponizing the Dept of Health against small businesses in our state is about as cold-hearted, totalitarian as it gets. Walz continues to act as if he is capable of creating his owns laws and his compliant Commissioners like Malcolm are his enforcers. Are we still a free country?! Although Malcom is commonly referred in the media and at the Capitol as "Commissioner", her appointment by Walz has never been approved by the Republican controlled Minnesota Senate. It currently awaits floor action that Majority Leader Paul Gazelka or his leadership team, like Assistant Majority Leader, Warren Limmer, can bring to a floor vote. In other words, at any time, Senate Republicans can do something about Walz' weaponization of the Dept of Health: **they could fire Jan Malcolm!** Republicans have been kicked in the teeth by Walz’ authoritarian edict that House Democrats continue to rubber-stamp. They need to fight fire with fire and send Malcom packing to send a message that these illegal Emergency Orders won’t stand and Walz will pay a price.**** Action 4 Liberty has been leading the charge since the beginning on passing the legislative resolutions to End Walz’ Power. We only had 15 House Republicans voting with us back in mid April. Now we have all 59 House Republicans, 4 House Democrats, and the Minnesota Senate on board. **At this point, the next step that's needed is to let the Democrats know there will be a price to pay if they allow these illegal powers to continue on.** This is the one fighting chance we have in this state to finally hold Walz accountable for abusing the laws and ruling by authoritarian dictate. Weak Republicans need to actually stand up and fight like mad dogs. While Walz and Attorney General Keith Ellison are willing to threaten jail and fines, Republicans need to pull out all the stops and rain down political bombs to send a message this will not stand. Anything less is weakness.**** **It's up to Gazelka and Limmer to listen to you. If they blow this opportunity to deliver pain to Walz, we may never end Walz' Emergency Powers. Action 4 Liberty will make sure voters in their district understand they refused to stand up to the Democrats when it really mattered.** Let's hope it doesn't come to that. Better call Paul and Warren.
### **Senator Paul Gazelka (Majority Leader)**
### **Call or text: 218-821-9287**
### **Email: sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn**
### **Senator Warren Limmer (Assistant Majority Leader)**
### **Call: 651-296-2159**
### **Email: sen.warren.limmer@senate.mn **
**Script:** Senator, Minnesota Senate Republicans MUST bring pain to the Walz Administration until he or House Democrats are willing to end his abusive emergency powers. You have the power to fire Jan Malcolm, Walz' small business hit squad leader. Walz just weaponized MDH to go after our businesses and you MUST do something about that immediately. Fire Malcolm unless Walz end's his emergency powers. Anything less shows that Republicans are useless politicians who aren't willing to fight for us against this enormous threat to our liberty. **Alternate Script:** Senator, I saw how Republicans in the Senate fired one of Walz' Commissioners in August and for the first time, I was proud you guys had some backbone. Now is the time to employ the same move and fire the leader of Walz' hit squad, Jan Malcolm. The Governor just weaponized her to go after small businesses in Minnesota who are barely able to survive in this climate. You need to fire Malcolm now unless Walz' is willing to give up his emergency powers. If you have friends and family who haven't signed the petition to End Walz' Emergency Powers, please forward this email to them. | [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=5 "SIGN THE PETITION") [SIGN THE PETITION](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=6)
---
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=better_call_paul&n=9), software for leaders.

body:
A new poll just showed that we are leading the fight to represent PA-10 in Congress, and I’m asking you to step up to help keep us in the lead
**Friend -- Because of your support, we are leading the fight to represent PA-10 in Congress!** It’s clear that South Central Pennsylvanians are ready to send a leader to Washington who will fight for _everyone_ in our community, not big special interests or the powerful elite.

Friend, I know that with this grassroots team on my side, we can flip this seat blue in just a few short weeks, but we have to keep up our momentum until the very end. **So I’m coming to you today with an important request: Will you chip in $5 or more to help us stay in the lead and win this race?**

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualewq32020?refcode=September**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19090704/249254937/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=c979e499-81f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc5ZTQ5OS04MWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aalYuf9bvNO5MRVujRPo17ud7btyD4pwcLGAVLbRbk=)

Thank you for everything you do.

_Eugene_

On Tues, September 8, 2020 at 11:21 AM Polling@EugeneForCongress.com wrote: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19090705/249254965/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=c979e499-81f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc5ZTQ5OS04MWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aalYuf9bvNO5MRVujRPo17ud7btyD4pwcLGAVLbRbk=) **Team -- A new poll was just released, and it shows that Eugene is leading the race to represent PA-10 in Congress!** | [Keep Eugene in the lead »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19090706/249254966/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=c979e499-81f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc5ZTQ5OS04MWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aalYuf9bvNO5MRVujRPo17ud7btyD4pwcLGAVLbRbk=)
---

Team, this poll shows that we have all the momentum to win this race, but we can’t let up now. Just last week, Scott Perry aired his first ad of the election -- and it’s full of blatant lies about Eugene.

**Scott Perry knows he can’t win on his record, so he’s lying to voters in a desperate attempt to cling to his seat in Congress.** _What a disgrace._

Team, we know that our best chance at winning this race and combatting Perry’s attacks comes from taking Eugene’s message directly to voters. Every TV ad we air, every call we make, every text we send, and every voter we reach is going to make a huge difference on Election Day, so we can’t take a single moment for granted.

[**Is there any amount you can chip in now to continue fighting back against Scott Perry’s lies and help us keep Eugene in the lead to flip PA-10 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19090707/249254967/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=c979e499-81f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc5ZTQ5OS04MWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aalYuf9bvNO5MRVujRPo17ud7btyD4pwcLGAVLbRbk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Donate $5 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19090708/249254968/1819641719?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=c979e499-81f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTc5ZTQ5OS04MWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aalYuf9bvNO5MRVujRPo17ud7btyD4pwcLGAVLbRbk=)

clean_body: A new poll just showed that we are leading the fight to represent PA-10 in Congress, and I’m asking you to step up to help keep us in the lead Friend -- Because of your support, we are leading the fight to represent PA-10 in Congress! It’s clear that South Central Pennsylvanians are ready to send a leader to Washington who will fight for everyone in our community, not big special interests or the powerful elite. Friend, I know that with this grassroots team on my side, we can flip this seat blue in just a few short weeks, but we have to keep up our momentum until the very end. So I’m coming to you today with an important request: Will you chip in $5 or more to help us stay in the lead and win this race? = Thank you for everything you do. Eugene On Tues, September 8, 2020 at 11:21 AM Polling@EugeneForCongress.com wrote: = Team -- A new poll was just released, and it shows that Eugene is leading the race to represent PA-10 in Congress! | = Team, this poll shows that we have all the momentum to win this race, but we can’t let up now. Just last week, Scott Perry aired his first ad of the election -- and it’s full of blatant lies about Eugene. Scott Perry knows he can’t win on his record, so he’s lying to voters in a desperate attempt to cling to his seat in Congress. What a disgrace. Team, we know that our best chance at winning this race and combatting Perry’s attacks comes from taking Eugene’s message directly to voters. Every TV ad we air, every call we make, every text we send, and every voter we reach is going to make a huge difference on Election Day, so we can’t take a single moment for granted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. body:

Career politician Pete Sessions is trying to get back to Washington any way he can. And, honestly, we know why. Here are just some of the ways he used the power that voters trusted him with for his own gain: ✔ Sessions’ PAC paid for his membership to a Maryland golf club using campaign funds. ✔ He also paid his family members tens of thousands of dollars in salary. ✔ When he first ran, he promised to support term limits of 12 years, __but he stayed in Washington for 22 years.__ **Sessions proved year after year that the only person he represents is himself.** In 2018, Dallas voters made it clear they were tired of his self-serving “service,” and now it’s time for Central Texas to do the same. **Our race is neck and neck. Friend,

We are less than two months away from Election Day and only a matter of days before voters begin receiving their ballots in the mail, and I wanted to send you a personal note about how much your support means to me and our campaign ahead of our last Federal Elections Commission end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election.

We have seen an outpouring of support here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and have received a donation from every state in the country! Supporters like you are powering this campaign, which is why we have been gaining so much momentum.

Your support inspires me every single day to work tirelessly to become the next representative for the people of Florida’s 16th District, and I hope our people-powered campaign inspires you, too. In the face of so many challenges, our team of volunteers are overcoming obstacles to reach our goals week in and week out. And grassroots supporters like you are contributing what they can to help power our campaign.

**Words can’t describe how grateful I am for your support.**

**[Now, I’m asking if you can step up for the first time and contribute to our people-powered campaign before our last FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election. We can’t flip this seat blue and deliver accountability to Washington without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19091486/249268208/1073285021?refcode2=7e5340a1-86f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=2e221452-86f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=7e5340a1-86f3-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091020-es-mm-fr-series-1a-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTUzNDBhMS04NmYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHzey698mKQbd8hSrbfkfu4z8fseyguGfY1NkcHz5Bs=)**

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. We have seen an outpouring of support here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and have received a donation from every state in the country! Supporters like you are powering this campaign, which is why we have been gaining so much momentum. Your support inspires me every single day to work tirelessly to become the next representative for the people of Florida’s 16th District, and I hope our people-powered campaign inspires you, too. In the face of so many challenges, our team of volunteers are overcoming obstacles to reach our goals week in and week out. And grassroots supporters like you are contributing what they can to help power our campaign. Words can’t describe how grateful I am for your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = All eyes are on our campaign, and with your support before our final FEC deadline, we can show everyone our strength, powered by grassroots supporters like you. Together, we can overcome the odds, flip this seat blue, win Florida, and win the White House. But only if I can count on your support before this critical fundraising deadline. Thank you for all you do, Margaret PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Lauren Boebert for Congress in CO-03.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 10, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Lauren Boebert in CO-03
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Lauren Boebert for Congress in CO-03.
Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"There is no doubt about it, Lauren Boebert will fight for our liberties in Congress. As a small business owner, she knows what harmful government regulations can do. She has stood up to the far-left in Colorado and if elected to Congress, we know she will stand up to them in Washington D.C."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---

---

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: Block out the noise. Time to execute.
body:
Peter,
If, like me, you regularly keep up with the news, you’re probably exhausted.
We’ve gone from an obsession with the crisis of the day to the crisis of every minute.
In other words, there is a lot of noise.
As November 3rd approaches, it’s our job to block it out, stay focused, and execute. And, on that note, here are some specific things for you to know:
Right now, we are in the midst of recruiting one million Christian voters in the states of Michigan, Pennsylvania, Georgia, Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Minnesota, North Carolina and Wisconsin.
In those states, we’re now running PSAs and we just launched our peer-to-peer texting campaign in order to reach voters in the most direct and effective way currently possible.
**And, at exactly the right time, we’ve had a new group of incredibly generous donors step up with an offer to match up to $550,000 in grassroots donations.**
So, as an American who cares about seeing our Judeo-Christian values restored, ask yourself a question what is more important over the next two months?
Do you want to get upset by the latest aggression from the radical, secular left, or do you want to help us organize, mobilize, and ensure that 2020 is a victory for biblical values?
I am the National Spokesperson for My Faith Votes not only because we share a set of values, but because they are effective and know how to execute.
**[I’ve told you where things stand. Now, will you help to directly fund these efforts with a tax-deductible donation?](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200910apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200910apl01nd&n=1)**
We must maximize every day between now and November 3rd, and it can only happen with resources. Last month you helped us hit every goal, but now we are in September. It is mission-critical we reach this month’s goal.
Take a look around at our country. More than ever, it is in need of the values we hold dear. So, let us keep our eyes on the ball.
Thank you for your ongoing and direct support. It’s going to make the difference.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200910apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200910apl01nd&n=2)
Sincerely,

Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200910apl01nd&n=3)

clean_body: Peter, If, like me, you regularly keep up with the news, you’re probably exhausted. We’ve gone from an obsession with the crisis of the day to the crisis of every minute. In other words, there is a lot of noise. As November 3rd approaches, it’s our job to block it out, stay focused, and execute. And, on that note, here are some specific things for you to know: Right now, we are in the midst of recruiting one million Christian voters in the states of Michigan, Pennsylvania, Georgia, Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Minnesota, North Carolina and Wisconsin. In those states, we’re now running PSAs and we just launched our peer-to-peer texting campaign in order to reach voters in the most direct and effective way currently possible. And, at exactly the right time, we’ve had a new group of incredibly generous donors step up with an offer to match up to $550,000 in grassroots donations. So, as an American who cares about seeing our Judeo-Christian values restored, ask yourself a question what is more important over the next two months? Do you want to get upset by the latest aggression from the radical, secular left, or do you want to help us organize, mobilize, and ensure that 2020 is a victory for biblical values? I am the National Spokesperson for My Faith Votes not only because we share a set of values, but because they are effective and know how to execute. We must maximize every day between now and November 3rd, and it can only happen with resources. Last month you helped us hit every goal, but now we are in September. It is mission-critical we reach this month’s goal. Take a look around at our country. More than ever, it is in need of the values we hold dear. So, let us keep our eyes on the ball. name: Defeat Senator Cornyn
subject: His record on Medicare is ABYSMAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's no surprise his response to COVID-19 has been such a failure.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f66/7f51f7bc/4284c2c9/4efa3dc3/2795647752/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter,

Given Sen. Cornyn's record on Medicare, Social Security, and Medicaid, it's no surprise that he's failed to provide the relief Texans need to get through the COVID-19 pandemic.**He has a long history of voting to slash the basic programs Texans rely on every day.** He's voted to:
* **Privatize** Social Security.
* Turn Medicare into a **voucher program.**
* **Slash funding** for Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.
* **Raise the retirement age!**

But unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ knows that -- in addition to providing the immediate relief Texans still need in the midst of COVID-19 -- **we need to be expanding our health care and strengthening the programs our seniors and working families rely on,** not destroying them.

**Will you pitch in to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn this November so she can fight for us in the Senate?**

body:

Hoosier Republican,

It is more important than ever that Hoosiers band together to support a solid, principled candidate to be Indiana’s next attorney general.

You’ve know what’s at stake. Liberal AGs across the nation are ignoring the rule of law. They’re trying to defund the police, not defend the police like they deserve.

We cannot let that happen in Indiana.

Todd Rokita has a proven record of Conservatism as our former secretary of state and a member of Congress. He will fight for Hoosiers’ God-given, Constitutionally-protected rights, and defend the President’s America First agenda.

All citizens have a right to protest and express their freedom of speech, but the violence we’re seen across the nation must end. Todd won't ask our law enforcement to turn the other way when it comes to defending our citizens, and he will work hard to protect every Hoosier.

Will you please help us support Todd Rokita for Attorney General and protect the rule of law in Indiana?

name: Election Update (Freitas)
subject: do you want to fire Nancy Pelosi?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, Are you tired of Abigail Spanberger promising one thing and then doing another? She’s sold our district to Nancy Pelosi in exchange for Nancy protecting her seat in Congress. Spanberger voted to impeach our President . . . **and there’s nothing moderate about that.** Now Pelosi’s PAC is coming to her defense and meddling right here in our district. Virginians deserve better. It’s past time that we fire Nancy Pelosi and Abigail Spanberger and replace them with real leaders who will put Americans first instead of working for their California donors and special interest groups. Spanberger voted to impeach our President . . . and there’s nothing moderate about that. Now Pelosi’s PAC is coming to her defense and meddling right here in our district. Virginians deserve better. It’s past time that we fire Nancy Pelosi and Abigail Spanberger and replace them with real leaders who will put Americans first instead of working for their California donors and special interest groups. Will you join Nick by supporting his campaign to fire Nancy Pelosi? Your contribution will be DOUBLED and go to our Fire Nancy Pelosi Fund. #
Hi Team Dani,

We've got 54 days until November 3rd, and we know we have a good chance to win this election if we hit our voter contact goals. Your amazing support has gotten us this far, and **we need your continued help to ensure victory in November!**

We're having a Weekend of Action this Friday through Sunday, and we have BIG goals for the weekend. Can you help us contact thousands of voters this weekend? We'll get you set up with everything you need to make calls for Dani! [Just click here to sign up for a time that works best for you. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9bea15d9dc&e=140a9b81e7)

If you haven't made calls for a candidate before, our team will walk you through everything you need to know and we'll be on standby with any questions you may have. We _need_ your help to make this weekend a success. Can we count on you to join our Weekend of Action?

Dave McCarver
Team Dani

I'm fighting with all I've got to win this neck and neck race.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

the stakes in this fight are clear
Friend,

Yesterday, our team sent you an emailing outlining the stakes of this election.

As Sri’s communications director, I thought it would be important to uplift that email -- and let you know why this election is so important for our community.

**Friend, we’re faced with a clear choice in this fight.** On the ballot is a fired police officer with a history of misconduct ranging from destruction of evidence to improper arrests. As sheriff, he was downplaying the effects of COVID-19 _even as his own employees fell ill from it._

Also on the ballot, however, is an experienced public servant and leader who has dedicated his life to fighting for the issues that matter, from fixing our broken health care system to representing the power of American diplomacy all around the world.

_That’s_ the choice we face in this fight, friend: Aighter for the people vs. a corrupt career politician taking special interest money to prop up his own candidacy.

[**So who will you choose?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19095401/249326385/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.10_b1_jdm2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmVkNzFkNy05OWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JrpY8AWwfjuNFS178wSd1BsJBs1Yh6QQPDhBB_Dg24k=)

Friend, the stakes of this election have never been higher.

In the midst of this pandemic, we need a champion for affordable health care access -- not someone willing to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

As our economy faces a steep road to recovery, we need someone willing to prioritize working families -- not someone happy to accept corporate PAC money and be held accountable only to DC interests.

And as our country reckons with the lies and division plaguing our politics, we need a proven leader with moral clarity -- _not_ an ideologue who was sued for misconduct and willing to exploit what’s been broken to put himself in power.

Friend, we’re faced with a clear choice in this fight. On the ballot is a fired police officer with a history of misconduct ranging from destruction of evidence to improper arrests. As sheriff, he was downplaying the effects of COVID-19 even as his own employees fell ill from it. Also on the ballot, however, is an experienced public servant and leader who has dedicated his life to fighting for the issues that matter, from fixing our broken health care system to representing the power of American diplomacy all around the world. That’s the choice we face in this fight, friend: Aighter for the people vs. a corrupt career politician taking special interest money to prop up his own candidacy. = = Thanks, Jack Doyle Communications Director Sri 2020 \--------Forwarded Message------- Sent: 9/9/20 From: Team Sri Subject: what's at stake = | Friend, With 55 days left to go before Election Day, here’s where we stand: 1) Republican special interest groups are pouring millions of dollars into this race and are sending paid canvassers to our doors in the middle of a pandemic. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Our ads have them rattled . . .
body:
What did they expect? I’ve spent years rattling the left with my videos as a journalist. And I’m not stopping as a candidate.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392346-924530-5184212-4117800ab4-4a249dead8)
Patriot,

Since we released our latest ads on Friday, the Leftist media has been beside itself, grasping at anything to attack me with for the hard-hitting content we released.

I’m Laura Loomer. What did they expect? I’ve spent years rattling the left with my videos as a journalist. **And I’m not stopping as a candidate.**

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392346-924530-5184212-4117800ab4-4a249dead8)
Our ad “Lois Frankel is Meshuggah,” pointed out two facts:

* My Radical Democrat opponent Lois Frankel backs and cheers on Black Lives Matter
* Black Lives Matter called to defund America’s top ally in the Middle East and accused them of “genocide.”
The ad was even covered in the Jerusalem Post this morning, and the Democrat-controlled Anti-Defamation League called the ad “disgusting”.

At the same time, the Democrat Majority for Israel published a statement calling the ad “wholly and completely dishonest.”

They even called the ad “racist.”

But even the left-leaning Jerusalem Post verified the integrity of the ad, writing:

_In fact, the genocide accusation and call for ending aid came from the 2016 platform of the Movement for Black Lives, a coalition of organizations that aims to formulate policy for the Black Lives Matter movement._
And that’s the truth . . . but since when did the truth matter to the rabid left?

**As these groups accuse me of “racism,” they continue to ignore the anti-Semites in power: Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and AOC, to name a few.**

While the ad has gone viral and has been seen over a million times, we need to get it up and running to VOTERS IN MY DISTRICT.

**[DONATE $10 NOW TO REACH 400 VOTERS](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392346-924530-5184212-4117800ab4-4a249dead8).

[DONATE $20 NOW TO REACH 800 VOTERS](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392346-924530-5184213-0d6bf2b92e-4a249dead8).

We have them on their heels, scrambling to deflect their hypocrisy in defending Lazy Lois Frankel. [Help me keep up the pressure](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392346-924530-5184212-4117800ab4-4a249dead8).

subject: Sen. Rand Paul: We Must Take Appropriate Measures That Allow Kids to Get Back to School
body:
Every closed school is parents who can’t go to work. Every closed school puts at-risk kids more at risk. Every closed school is parents who can't... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=79bd2b319a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sen. Rand Paul: We Must Take Appropriate Measures That Allow Kids to Get Back to School**

“We should take [Coronavirus] seriously. But we should take the rest of our society seriously, too, and take appropriate measures that allow us to get back to school, to work, and to resurrecting our economy,” Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY), M.D., writes in _The Hill_.

“Every closed school is parents who can’t go to work. Every closed school puts at-risk kids more at risk. Every closed school that is closed out of fear and not reality is a tragedy we should avoid.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25ec84927d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “A hard rain fell on the corner of 47th and Union where Dajore Wilson, 8, was shot and killed, another child victim of Chicago’s endless street gang wars. On this gray Tuesday morning, she would have been starting third grade . . . Is there a rain hard enough to cleanse Chicago of sins like these?” John Kass writes in the [_Chicago Tribune_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e1cf03ad3&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| Second Lady Karen Pence visited Hunter Army Airfield in Savannah, Georgia, yesterday to “speak to soldiers and commanders about suicide prevention and other mental health issues,” Dal Cannady writes. “Pence’s visit comes during Suicide Prevention Month . . . She urged them not to suffer in silence but to ask for help.” Read more in [WTOC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cdee978edf&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “[Black Lives Matter] has established itself as the prism through which Blacks in America view ourselves—and is attempting to define us. The message we are getting is: if you are a Black American and you are not completely on board with every single thing that is done or said to advocate for this organization, then you are not Black, or you are not Black enough . . . Just as White people have every right to hold a wide range of beliefs, Black people do as well. No race is monolithic,” Rob Smith writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f217e30f1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8eb88d70b8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11257f33cd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=89482d4fc1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The lawless left has gone too far.

| Friend,
The lawless left has gone too far, and I need YOUR help to take them on.
Day in and day out, we are witnessing the destruction of our country, the loss of law and order, and the infringement of our rights.
I'm emailing you today to say we cannot stay silent any longer.
It's fairly simple: If we do not protect the lawful, the lawless will win. Right now, we are in the fight for the soul of our nation.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I am proud to announce that I have received the highest possible rating and the official endorsement from the National Rifle Association. The second amendment is under attack, and my opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House Ben Ray Lujan, has worked tirelessly to chip away at your Second Amendment rights. Ben Ray wants to BAN certain firearms— including the most popular rifle in America — that many New Mexicans use for hunting and self-protection. I strongly believe in protecting New Mexicans’ constitutional right to keep and bear arms and will fight to ensure the radical left NEVER takes away guns from law-abiding New Mexicans. That’s why the NRA has endorsed me for US Senate and given Ben Ray Lujan a FAILING GRADE. | Ben Ray’s gun-grabbing record in the New Mexico house is unredeemable and is just another example of Ben Ray putting the interests of his party leaders over New Mexicans, and if he is elected to the US Senate, nothing is standing in the way of Democrats implementing their radical gun agenda. If you want a Senator that will always put the rights of New Mexicans first, | | | Thank you so much for your continued support Mark P.S. The National Rifle Association has endorsed me for US Senate and given my opponent, Ben Ray Lujan, a failing grade. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

name: Sandy Smith
subject: 47 years in Washington is enough!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a business owner, not a career politician, and I will serve its people and NOT myself!**

Joe Biden has been in DC for nearly five decades.
He and Nancy Pelosi have been responsible for nearly every disastrous government action in that time. The 1994 Crime Bill, Obamacare, Dodd-Frank, tax hikes, you name it.... it's all their fault.
I'm running against another career politician who messes up constantly and doesn't know when to leave the stage: G.K. Butterfield. He's Nancy Pelosi's Deputy Whip, and they are two peas in a pod!
_**Honestly, I don't even know why Butterfield runs for office. All he does is take orders from Nancy Pelosi! He doesn't even like his own district; he lives in a place in DC with his girlfriend, and only returns on rare occasions.**_
_He could get away with that stuff when this district included the Democrat stronghold of Durham- but it doesn't anymore! Since the courts cut out Durham and added hundreds of thousands of Republican donors.... G.K. is in trouble!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng)
---

_Our district is ready to give Pelosi's lieutenant the boot; I've already raised over 10x what G.K.'s previous best Republican opponent has raised!_

People in North Carolina are sick and tired of Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. Queen Nancy dines on gourmet ice cream and gets her hair done by special appointment at a closed salon.... while she gives more power to radical members of the Democrats, including AOC!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=C2wfWWsVKPrL.YK6TuQIjg)
---

**_Joe Biden has been in office so long he has lost his cognitive ability. Check out what he said about his decline to a group of Black and Hispanic journalists:_**

_“No, I haven’t taken a test! Why the hell would I take a test? Come on, man! That’s like saying to you before you got on this program you have to take a test where you’re taking cocaine or not. What do you think huh? Are you a junkie?”_

_50 years is more than enough for Joe Biden to be in politics, 40 years is more than enough for Nancy Pelosi, and 40 years is enough for G.K. Butterfield._

The Democrat Press makes excuses for them. They say that having a country run by leftists past their prime is a good thing.

I beg to differ.

**Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you. They just want to control you with rules that they stopped caring about long ago!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iJTUJxYcg3Nxmng&b=NWkMYU7mEli0wURt87_7ng) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLBwsHOxM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLBwsHOxM)

Queen Nancy dines on gourmet ice cream and gets her hair done by special appointment at a closed salon.... while she gives more power to radical members of the Democrats, including AOC! Joe Biden has been in office so long he has lost his cognitive ability. Check out what he said about his decline to a group of Black and Hispanic journalists: “No, I haven’t taken a test! Why the hell would I take a test? Come on, man! That’s like saying to you before you got on this program you have to take a test where you’re taking cocaine or not. What do you think huh? Are you a junkie?” 50 years is more than enough for Joe Biden to be in politics, 40 years is more than enough for Nancy Pelosi, and 40 years is enough for G.K. Butterfield. The Democrat Press makes excuses for them. They say that having a country run by leftists past their prime is a good thing. I beg to differ. Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you. They just want to control you with rules that they stopped caring about long ago! Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I ! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: One year since I launched this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
Friend, WOW: **It's been exactly one year since I formally launched this Senate campaign.**

_The world has changed in ways that are tough to process._

But some things haven't changed at all:

The child poverty rate in rural Georgia is among the worst in the nation.

Millions of Georgians still lack high-quality, affordable health care.

Georgia still has one of the worst maternal mortality rates in the entire country, and the privacy of women's reproductive health care is still under attack.

The President of the United States is still an aspiring despot with authoritarian instincts and contempt for the rule of law.

**Washington is still riddled with corruption that's turned Congress into a tool of powerful private interests like pharmaceutical companies and big polluters.**

My opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, is still too busy handing out favors to his donors and apologizing for Donald Trump to serve the people he's sworn to represent.

**[The problems that need solving aren't mysterious. Neither are the solutions. What's needed is new leadership. Friend, will you help me win?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e296a/5b2c1286/3906d624/25f0b99f/1260153745/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_one_yr?refcode=em_2020_09_10_one_yr")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---

Friend, when I announced my run for U.S. Senate, I said **_Georgia was going to be the country's MOST COMPETITIVE STATE in 2020._**

The pundits said that was preposterous.

Twelve months later, I am leading GOP Senator David Perdue in the polls, and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than ANY OTHER DEMOCRATIC CHALLENGER in America.

Twelve months ago, I said my opponent was the embodiment of the corrupt Washington establishment. _Then he got caught fiendishly trading stocks while publicly downplaying the risk of COVID-19._

**A year ago, I said we'd need a grassroots army unlike anything Georgia had seen to defeat Perdue. And with your help, we're poised to generate RECORD TURNOUT in Georgia.**

**Friend, your grassroots support -- these $10, $20, and $30 contributions -- KEEP US GOING. We truly depend on you.**

_YOU are why Mitch McConnell has been forced to pour tens of millions of dollars into a last-ditch effort to save David Perdue._

**[Together, we will win this race, retake the U.S. Senate, and turn the page on this dark chapter in our history. Can you chip in a few dollars right now to make sure we stay on track?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e296a/5b2c1286/3906d624/25f0b99f/1260153745/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_one_yr?refcode=em_2020_09_10_one_yr")**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
**We just got some big news about the Arizona Senate race.**
While Mark Kelly is still in a strong position to flip this seat -- and help Democrats take back the Senate -- _outside groups aligned with Mitch McConnell are preparing to drop $10.6 million worth of ads to keep this seat red in November._ **Mark needs our support now so he can fight back.**
**[We need to win this race -- and flip the Senate. Can you rush in a $5 contribution?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200909-mark-kelly?refcode=em200909i_974&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Arizona is one of our best shots at flipping a red seat blue in this election, Peter.
With the GOP's special interests spending big bucks to defeat Mark Kelly, he needs all hands on deck to help win this race. It's hard to see how we can win a Senate majority without Arizona.
**[Can Mark count on your support to flip this seat -- and the Senate? Pitch in $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200909-mark-kelly?refcode=em200909i_974&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200909-mark-kelly?refcode=em200909i_974&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Iowa House races will be decided by razor-thin margins! **[We need your help to fight back for a united, blue Iowa](https://act.myngp.com/el/CvrFrVqI-owqzZeNfRjHqf7XsNEZeeoMAlsDVlzxVUc=/saozYpHEavkzUPx6UztyOe4yAhlvbGqMR3kNr7p5N0o=?refcode=200910-email-rh-1)** | ****[Donate to three IA races](https://act.myngp.com/el/CvrFrVqI-owqzZeNfRjHqf7XsNEZeeoMAlsDVlzxVUc=/saozYpHEavkzUPx6UztyOe4yAhlvbGqMR3kNr7p5N0o=?refcode=200910-email-rh-1&amount=5&express_lanes=true)****

* * *
We're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the resources we need to keep up in some of the most competitive races in the country.
Dark money GOP groups are flooding Iowa and all these races are projected to be won by razor-thin margins. Iowa Democrats stick together, and we need our small-dollar donor base to step up now more than ever with less than two months until Election Day.
**[Iowans across our state need leaders who will protect affordable health care and Social Security and create an economy that works for everyone. Donate $30 today and send $10 to each of our campaigns!](https://act.myngp.com/el/CvrFrVqI-owqzZeNfRjHqf7XsNEZeeoMAlsDVlzxVUc=/RVz5cKdmvH2i6h-Wo1zuJy2ML4dPE1qf8ClIrfdEdWc=?refcode=200910-email-rh-1)**

This is what community is all about -- coming together to work through challenges. We aren't afraid of a competitive race or outside money, and we won't let GOP forces in Washington stop us from representing real Iowa values in Washington.
**[We know that with so much on the line, we can't afford to leave anything up to chance. We need to stand together and show that our community is stronger than their divisiveness; donate $5, $25 or $50 today to split evenly between all three races.](https://act.myngp.com/el/CvrFrVqI-owqzZeNfRjHqf7XsNEZeeoMAlsDVlzxVUc=/RVz5cKdmvH2i6h-Wo1zuJy2ML4dPE1qf8ClIrfdEdWc=?refcode=200910-email-rh-1)**
