clean_body: | | | URGENT NEWS: Iowa House races will be decided by razor-thin margins! | ** We're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the resources we need to keep up in some of the most competitive races in the country. Dark money GOP groups are flooding Iowa and all these races are projected to be won by razor-thin margins. Iowa Democrats stick together, and we need our small-dollar donor base to step up now more than ever with less than two months until Election Day. This is what community is all about -- coming together to work through challenges. We aren't afraid of a competitive race or outside money, and we won't let GOP forces in Washington stop us from representing real Iowa values in Washington. Thanks for all your support, Rita Hart for Congress ****Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!_** | **** Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. subject: Tom Fitton: Leftists Want to BREAK Voting System Through Mail-in-Voting Push!
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared on “Lou Dobbs Tonight” on the Fox Business Network to discuss the risks of mail-in-voting for the upcoming election, how we may not know the actual results, & more!
| | |

|

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51381&L=20406&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1MRkdZVnA1bGlHYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW9uK3RoZSthaXImdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkxMDE4MTkzMA==)
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared on “Lou Dobbs Tonight” on the Fox Business Network to discuss the risks of mail-in-voting for the upcoming election, how we may not know the actual results, & more!

**John Durham, FBI Haven't DONE ANYTHING on #ObamaGate Investigation--What's Going On?

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51381&L=20407&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RRzl4bFl6OGJybyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW9uK3RoZSthaXImdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkxMDE4MTkzMA==)**
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared on “Lou Dobbs Tonight” to discuss Judicial Watch filing an opposition to a request to dismiss the civil rights lawsuit against Mayor Bowser; Attorney General Barr stating there may not be a report from U.S. Attorney Durham concerning the FBI and intelligence agencies; Director of National Intelligence John Ratcliffe stating he has had to coordinate with Durham's review into the possible links of Russian interference in Trump's 2016 campaign; an intelligence report showing that Russia is seeking to amplify concerns of mail-in voter fraud; North Carolina experiencing a high level of mail-in ballot requests; and more! **Tom Fitton: President Trump Should INVOKE Insurrection Act to Stop the Riots in America**

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51381&L=20323&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1raHV3eXJsOGx0SSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW9uK3RoZSthaXImdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkxMDE4MTkzMA==)
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared on "Lou Dobbs Tonight” on the Fox Business Network to discuss Lindsay Graham’s keeping GOP Judiciary Committee Senators in the dark about the interview of FBI Agent Joe Pientka; why Graham has waited so long to call Comey to testify; a Judge ordering an Iowa County to invalidate 50,000 absentee ballot requests; Judicial Watch’s opposition to DC’s effort to throw out a lawsuit alleging the DC mayor and other officials violated Judicial Watch’s First Amendment rights; and more!

Friend,

Are you looking to get more involved in our grassroots operation as we sprint down the homestretch to November 3rd?

With debates, early voting, and critical election deadlines right around the corner, we want to make it easier for you to be the first to know about what’s happening on the campaign trail.

**Sign up for Team LaHood SMS alerts by updating your cell phone number to stay in the loop.**
[**Update Cell Phone**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a7da45287e02400dbd7df08c63b380c4&_e=-Q053fZTR-a3qmwXi5dCEpNXBgEzbCbFE8K_9yO2zXCN5smmW9EtYeyCnMDOZijg5RdvXqau76TwlANESj7w1OUNm8a9E4oy1SEMWszYLgi3NKVKeZyB3bvYL0cZcFtgEOkAOGi8qccw7FF08ADEAKRBXfpJRmzylgYpiskg8Zfnl02RaVYrCXhoSyen9CmI8vtmvMjYhCSUVA0qRytkcAz4sBOd1XnxDNHLtxlEkJQnVFE5JTlY3HbzNkVaNSBjadgoB4POOVp2CewA1dtMSklBpLB47DOqfaFKXpwLekwG521d_-myBh-3RMkOd79yAfPDuwnKhGrw0Ylnp8yahVN53yrPn2viH3JFGHIj7heCFpV2tAVkhurDSUc_oVJoQZtHwjWZ6G82luGpVK-NqJkK78j3wlTVvnCpkOMx0QqoZkZmVd5-v9pQ7KQdfL0ZEJUi4vu217e0Joa6HmZaN4-0Dinlq64_4VVRsKGsgYA%3D)
Things are ramping up right now that we’re in the final weeks of this election cycle.

We won’t be able to finish this race strong and take back the House without a strong network of grassroots supporters at our side.

_Friend, can we count on you to update your phone number and help us bring Darin across the finish line on November 3rd?_
[**Update Cell Phone**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a7da45287e02400dbd7df08c63b380c4&_e=-Q053fZTR-a3qmwXi5dCEpNXBgEzbCbFE8K_9yO2zXCN5smmW9EtYeyCnMDOZijg5RdvXqau76TwlANESj7w1OUNm8a9E4oy1SEMWszYLgi3NKVKeZyB3bvYL0cZcFtgEOkAOGi8qccw7FF08ADEAKRBXfpJRmzylgYpiskg8Zfnl02RaVYrCXhoSyen9CmI8vtmvMjYhCSUVA0qRytkcAz4sBOd1XnxDNHLtxlEkJQnVFE5JTlY3HbzNkVaNSBjadgoB4POOVp2CewA1dtMStw3sknoF8k5UrTRKPu4Pgf360gayAn6eVd-blM2wths94nxzMKIxG7TpxSAnswTFeUzMq-Y8S9cZae1a-2_QBZEahPYXh5bHepoKUOBpXs5rOpBNqCPv8y3Nujr746ZRLWeZlUAY05squjRMifQ7EyXZ9KVXWkOsoAq6-rlA6AJ-vBb0c9uEpeLpRf4WanmmuUTL9J8LZFovGpVPivO7TQ%3D)
Thank you – we’ll be in touch soon.

Team LaHood

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark's opponent @ Trump's Golf Course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
You read that right -- Mark Warner's GOP opponent is holding a major, high-dollar fundraiser at the Trump National Golf Course, in the middle of a pandemic.
|
---

| |
Derek --

You read that right -- Mark Warner's GOP opponent is holding a major, high-dollar fundraiser at the Trump National Golf Course, in the middle of a pandemic.

For those of you keeping score at home, that's the same golf course that President Trump likes to golf at after he finishes up tweeting for the morning.

**_This is just more tangible proof that Daniel Gade is setting himself up to align with Trump in every way._**

Gade really seems to believe what he's said repeatedly on the campaign trail -- that Trump is doing a "great job" handling coronavirus. Gade equated wearing a mask to "tyranny," and in his mind that's not hyperbole -- he's falling in line with Donald Trump's dangerous pattern of downplaying the serious health risk of coronavirus. All while praising Trump for his handling of the virus and further enriching him with a lavish fundraiser at his golf course.

Virginia needs a leader who takes public health crises seriously and will spend their time leading by example -- not going against the advice of public health professionals. We need a leader like Mark Warner, who led the charge to expand unemployment benefits, protect families facing eviction, and provide low-interest loans for small businesses during the pandemic.

So let's show Daniel Gade that Virginians are backing science and reason and supporting Mark Warner -- **let's raise $5,000 before his fundraiser starts tonight.**

[**Can you join us in supporting Mark Warner and sending a strong message that Mark's the right choice for Virginia?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf8/53d9897e/55fe69fa/1c880933/3161592437/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gadegolf?refcode=20200910_f_1_nd__768__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf8/53d9897e/55fe69fa/1c880932/3161592437/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gadegolf?refcode=20200910_f_1_nd__768__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf8/53d9897e/55fe69fa/1c880931/3161592437/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Ethan
subject: So many ways to support Betsy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Can you believe there are less than 55 days until Election Day?! Things are gearing up here in State Senate District 18, and we want to make sure we finish strong. Below are a variety of different ways you can help the campaign: volunteering, writing letters to the editor, attending fundraising events, and more. Turning out the vote for Betsy means helping Democrats up & down the ballot, too. Check out the list below of our upcoming events and opportunities.** ** We're looking forward to more as we continue towards November. Hope to see you at one..or all of them! Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Ethan
* * *
**Please join us via Zoom for Phone Bank parties!** _We will be making calls with a brief training provided at the beginning. _ _Help us reach out to voters across Senate District 18!_ **Tuesday, September 15th** 6:30 - 8:30 pm with Progress NEO [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/NIM_iIr-1Mdltwo7sGAoOGYcL27yz1Y0woRnsSEF_ps=) **Monday, September 21st** 6:00 - 8:00 pm with WAKE [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/l0hxXo3gq3zbiERdDX8g0G9HdUOxibHypaUKXTr33JQ=) **Wednesday, September 23rd** 6:00 - 8:00 pm pm with Human Rights Campaign [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/n_ajGlEwApODg6eJXQuenf4qkflSPsr4I1hziC15KFU=) You can also use [this link at any time to sign up](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/7Jlsgedk-F5CbhpXsr9R_awgcDsOhKTZXxFJ2MLTZNs=) for open phone bank shifts! _Walk the neighborhoods and leave information about Betsy 's race for voters in the district! _ _It 's socially distant, fun, and a great way to support the campaign!_ **Saturday, September 12th** 10 am - 12 pm Meet at: Lake County Democratic HQ 7547 Mentor Ave # 107, Mentor, OH 44060 [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/2_sLpjTmYwWtQCBAsV4tZLqzKdFqhoG_jR1Ds_MKTtI=) **Sunday, September 20th** 1:00 - 3:00 pm Meet at: Lake County Democratic HQ 7547 Mentor Ave # 107, Mentor, OH 44060 [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/vsZbPmiDoZdh52enYL3WkvTwUahoNnn8WpOYoNBbCRY=)
Interested in sharing an issue you care about while supporting Betsy? Our team would love to help you with resources for writing letters to the editor! Contact Ethan at ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com or 567-203-3847 if you are interested. **Join Doctors Organized for Healthcare Solutions** **for a virtual fundraising event with Betsy!** Event will also feature Dr. Lederman, an expert in infectious diseases, for his expertise on the ongoing pandemic and vaccine development Event will be held via Zoom **Tuesday, September 22nd at 8:00 pm** [Click here to RSVP](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/K2eQpJJFGirCJkIxuVlQduBTF5Y0WMmSkMnZnipDcV0=) or contact Ethan directly at: ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com or 567-203-3847 to receive your link to the event **Betsy grew up around the racetrack, so what better way to see the district** **than with a fun scavenger-hunt race to support _her_ race! ** Hop in your car, get your first clue, and then follow the clues to locations around State Senate District 18! **Sunday, September 27th** Start times will be assigned after RSVP. You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm, with prizes awarded at 5:30 pm. You will start at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters (2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio) [Click here to RSVP ](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/AvD0Bk7QcPJQyU7MIceKtVbJtixnDxavv8l1tolNN9E=)or contact Ethan directly at: ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com or 567-203-3847 to receive your link to the event
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/LiEaSNgtU-_078omQlfPXm0Fl8qcEN1Z4OZS7L1h4cM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/ys3ADfJ0Z4SVwtqy7HFJdSaNaPq1WCA5cFzpGYwPp6A=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/B9lQmuHl6AIQRD425IPofhegL5ZIM1lBWNg8Ll7upiE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/vCW0U1DGVjLalOQXOke3yT22OIyFU525tDvt2fXcRlo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4AOBB0oXOISh7QZMR6Bj3oeSOZWOJGz6IVHz-QBCT3U=/9s9WzxSLgY7zeVAbqF28Q7_FCwbfgMJnjdEhwAC2E8c=)

subject: Will YOU endorse Linda for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
While Election Day is officially 53 days away, every registered voter in California will receive a mail-in ballot this year, meaning folks will be casting their votes as early as October!

With less than a month before ballots drop, we're calling on each and every one of you to join Team Sánchez as an official citizen endorser >>

Re-electing Linda will take a true grassroots effort. She's ready to continue fighting for the working families of CA-38 in Congress, but to do that we need to make sure she has the people on her side.

We've set our sights high: we want 5,000 Citizen Endorsers by the end of the week -- however, we can only get there with your help!

Can we count on you to become a Citizen Endorser of Linda's re-election campaign along with forwarding this email to friends?

Thank you!

-- Sánchez HQ

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/UYVhOXy5kZp_X2FyQJ9PU4Ry-T9_ThD7cMgAyhqhWTY=/_QQRxf3ylTD0AwXG8HY1ltMd3tDpbd3k5NMeVEdEPy0=.

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: Demand climate be central to the presidential debates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The climate crisis is happening right now.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2833%2E53494%2EqNiMuu) Friend, Right now, people across the American West are breathing in the smoke of wildfires of unprecedented size and fury. Thousands are leaving their homes in search of air that's safe to breathe. Meanwhile, folks in Louisiana are rebuilding from Hurricane Laura, one of the strongest storms ever to hit the United States. No matter where you live, it's becoming clearer by the day that climate change is not a chart or a graph, nor is it a vision of some far-off future. It's happening right here, right now -- and we need to start talking about bold solutions on the national stage immediately. All eyes will be on the debates this fall, so we're asking the debate moderators to take this threat -- already at our doorstep -- seriously as they put together their questions. **[Sign our petition to call on moderators Chris Wallace, Susan Page, Steve Scully, and Kristen Welker to question the candidates on their climate plans during this fall's presidential and vice presidential debates.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/852?t=3&akid=2833%2E53494%2EqNiMuu)** Thanks, Sam Ricketts
Co-Founder, Evergreen Action | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/852?t=4&akid=2833%2E53494%2EqNiMuu)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2833%2E53494%2EqNiMuu). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Questions from our kids
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend, Over the past few months, Commissioner Infante-Green and I have talked to a wide range of experts, from local child psychologists to Dr. Anthony Fauci, about what school is going to look like this year. I hope we've answered your questions along the way and that what you've heard has helped you feel more comfortable sending your children back to school this fall. Today, joined by the Department of Health's Dr. Jim McDonald and Barbara Cottam, Chair of the Rhode Island Board of Education, we devoted our entire forum to answering questions that were submitted from students across the state.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MUYSQnEK4UqCpUUWKdoLveJitkmi7wZh3wJbFLt6TiuPu2k-iPh4wSdnk0waQYxPHDoJjP2gh1E9UDJb8HESpy2GlQX8EcjQpEvgIA3tNOI8anBlSdPBvyKRFRjcOFDUquKy050Sv3Q5kjf4pj3LYw88cbx_1iAP8RaQUCQWZBJLVVi5iDQ9g9vQuHLwPDI_zaaVhWs3v_8=&c=otkDtIhbYViCakykW-VxvH9odEV3gz2rpg7y53JGInsW0rLnjSHqCQ==&ch=lEB8HjI5Su6r8SAAmuuI3jTGtYDrwPRfXTM6lXJs5BQ0ENYL1reOag==)
---
| I'm so grateful to the over 100 students who sent us their questions about social distancing, graduations, and how to wear your mask without getting your glasses all fogged up. Of course, Dr. McDonald brought some props. And Barbara had some great, creative ideas for kids to have fun with their friends while staying safe. I hope you and your children will give the [video a watch](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MUYSQnEK4UqCpUUWKdoLveJitkmi7wZh3wJbFLt6TiuPu2k-iPh4wSdnk0waQYxPHDoJjP2gh1E9UDJb8HESpy2GlQX8EcjQpEvgIA3tNOI8anBlSdPBvyKRFRjcOFDUquKy050Sv3Q5kjf4pj3LYw88cbx_1iAP8RaQUCQWZBJLVVi5iDQ9g9vQuHLwPDI_zaaVhWs3v_8=&c=otkDtIhbYViCakykW-VxvH9odEV3gz2rpg7y53JGInsW0rLnjSHqCQ==&ch=lEB8HjI5Su6r8SAAmuuI3jTGtYDrwPRfXTM6lXJs5BQ0ENYL1reOag==). You can also watch all of the previous Back to School forums on my [Facebook page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MUYSQnEK4UqCpUUWKdoLveJitkmi7wZh3wJbFLt6TiuPu2k-iPh4wZkbpfcI67tTEs8tlDcqtsNHWnt6rP3IvCUgmqkH5SeL_OFnZ8E4VCWtXRlZK48V8zvgc9n96-5wsq6M3iDpw-Gh7uNnGaZXGks8jk8GWX4D&c=otkDtIhbYViCakykW-VxvH9odEV3gz2rpg7y53JGInsW0rLnjSHqCQ==&ch=lEB8HjI5Su6r8SAAmuuI3jTGtYDrwPRfXTM6lXJs5BQ0ENYL1reOag==).
This is our final Back to School forum, but we're still going to be out in front talking about the measures we're taking to keep our children safe. I'll be back on TV next Wednesday at 1 p.m. for our regularly scheduled press conference.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MUYSQnEK4UqCpUUWKdoLveJitkmi7wZh3wJbFLt6TiuPu2k-iPh4wWSYL-7x9sO_NeEn8Ny7CaqNtCKFz-vOazUjC6mHHN0jJX1K4qYsqsyH9k2bU8zu_GA2X6c1dF5RcCtmSBCvCoUCOTnfe2NEOu3vmpAslxZ0fmDYoOb6vGmKHWLIDDdcZYwKUPPE7x6kA1czZUKCKCU=&c=otkDtIhbYViCakykW-VxvH9odEV3gz2rpg7y53JGInsW0rLnjSHqCQ==&ch=lEB8HjI5Su6r8SAAmuuI3jTGtYDrwPRfXTM6lXJs5BQ0ENYL1reOag==)

_**“As politicians across the country attack our police departments, Matt Mowers has had our backs. When others wanted to defund the police, Mowers defended us...We are proud to support Matt Mowers for Congress.”**_

This is _HUGE_ for our campaign, especially since they endorsed our Democrat opponent Chris Pappas in 2018.

subject: Liberty Green "I Voted" enamel pin

body:
If you can, make a contribution of $25 or more, and we'll send you a free pin as a thank you. You'll help grow our grassroots movement, elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot, and lift | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525199/45c30650/1c0b91cf7/66e8cd76/3956105853/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In the past couple of months, you've stayed in this fight by Elizabeth's side with your eyes on November's election.

To say thank you and to commemorate the fact that our fight goes on, we're releasing a limited-edition enamel pin that says "I voted" in our signature Liberty Green.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Fails to Sign Abbott's Back the Blue Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Lizzie Fletcher Fails to Sign Abbott's Back the Blue Pledge**

Today, Representative Lizzie Fletcher refused to sign a pledge to protect Texas cities from the defund the police movement. Wesley Hunt proudly signed the pledge, put forward by Governor Greg Abbott, which states:

_"I sign this Texas Backs the Blue Pledge to oppose any efforts to defund the police and to show my support for the brave law enforcement officers who risk their lives to protect and serve. Defunding our police departments would invite crime into our communities and put people in danger. That is why I pledge to support any measure that discourages or stops efforts to defund police departments in Texas.

Our law enforcement officers have our backs every single day, and we need to show them that Texans have their backs."_

Efforts are already underway to cut police budgets in several Texas cities. In August, Austin’s City Council cut the Austin Police Department by one third and shortly thereafter the city of Dallas moved to defund $7 million from the Dallas Police Department’s overtime appropriations.

The far-left movement to cut funding for our police departments makes our cities less safe and puts vulnerable communities at risk. Wesley Hunt supports bringing positive reforms to our police departments but defunding the police does not accomplish that mission.

_“Lizzie Fletcher's failure to sign a pledge stating that she won't defund the police should be disqualifying to voters in the 7th District,_ " said Campaign Manager **Jim Hilk**. _"Her failure to sign this pledge mirrors her failure to stand up to the radical progressives in the Democratic party in Congress pushing to destroy Houston's energy jobs, eliminate employer sponsored healthcare and raise taxes on all Texans." _
Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a7e1b994821e46ffbe796e7cc91b61a5&_e=BiA6OnQe4wS5NDpdFN0tMfk3ThjPgsoNVQxtALrNXUFy8VGazh-nT_C_0UMAIP3G2XFzv1nYGKCrjoEf1TxGMjf46U_9OV54hsMKVbOsqCcPbUeDnG1LjOlpek_zhbFK0LWPCc8kp96pusFSeOaKs2NBoMpxJrOT3xrBln_BhAcIX86kRH0r-hDFrAsaOVIltvHm8b74_w7PdI0Yh4uN9WWJkyIhRJtpmaekxi-7y0Bn0LJUwkdTdMccnK6c9s4_g6jAOyTPLVVsWc4OVCRsJ2jcfPAy5-NzX4fpFkhzWxE%3D)****

name: Jay Inslee
subject: RSVP to join Attorney General Holder and I on Zoom tonight:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We'll talk civil rights, voting rights, and state leadership.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD) Friend, With vote-by-mail, we've tried to make voting as easy as possible in Washington state because we know that when all of us can vote more easily and more securely, our democracy is better for it. And I know just the person to talk to about the subject: former Attorney General Eric Holder. He's spent his career fighting to expand voting rights, especially in areas that are historically marginalized. We've seen what happens when we take our eye off the ball: Voters are being purged from the rolls in Georgia and Wisconsin, and Texas has instituted strict voter ID laws. **I'm excited to talk to Attorney General Holder about all this and more tonight at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET.[Can you join us, too? Donate $15 or whatever you can, and you can RSVP to join us for this fascinating conversation on Zoom.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11203?t=4&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11204?t=5&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11205?t=6&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11206?t=7&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11207?t=8&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11208?t=9&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11203?t=10&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)
---
Since leaving the Department of Justice, Attorney General Holder has focused all his energy on ending gerrymandering and creating more representative maps, fixing those that have given Republicans a disproportionate amount of power (basically ensuring that states would have permanent Republican majorities).
So, like me, he knows the power states have to influence the rest of the country -- in good ways and, too often, bad. There's so much we can do at the state level that makes the rest of the country stronger -- including embracing universal vote-by-mail! -- and I'm excited to talk more with him about that.
**[I hope you can join us: Donate $15 or whatever you can, and you can join former Attorney General Eric Holder and I on Zoom tonight.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11203?t=11&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11203?t=12&akid=8150%2E868730%2E8sEILD)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: 95 new testing sites
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Yesterday, Governor Holcomb announced that by October 1, Indiana will gain a total of 95 new COVID-19 testing sites – where testing will be free. | |
---
|
---
Friend,

Good news as Indiana continues getting Back on Track.

Yesterday, Governor Holcomb announced that by October 1, **Indiana will gain a total of 95 new COVID-19 testing sites – where testing will be free.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ac9529216d344a1930497af96575ef7&_e=t361by2cQ5i_pkSZGcSATfBqEZ23jmi4jpgGqfsTzydv6qesRaMTfE_t19AaGLP98oDfnjmzGHk7omKYBEL1JAsekwpgP4DUo5q4AaF3IVFHuYIo_HR8cNrInpVFeasBsd0yjLaC14qFSDcb3M8YzvZui0_FlsQml9qQR5ihcm5ZrNMynU6tLNjRIDB2cWQ1hijlaDHS4nhv0TvU7H0L3MOeY3pFDJutY2agzmmnIFOj49bD5UeZTQBHp-eHv0m8-QsFFBbK2X0Os3NKZ84b4C5Yqfj3tAdqWC07EsfZYscp5EVjA3GxGsz0MKRQ3iBUi-UWkjWppacV-86wO0ZqRpOlqMsZ7Fj1Wb0HS3Od5usuaecdrt3GgiGR96TzaT_fEX0NVhImQr8iuJ6HOXRtPEFeUxxd1nuJz2p-r5Nz4xssQb94G3tzZcYcBpD5j4Pr_wLfZARe6LbnPi_-x1l3gg%3D%3D)
As you can see from the map above, the testing sites are spread across 76 counties, with more than a dozen sites opening last week and 22 more slated to open by the end of this month.

Information about new testing sites will be available **[HERE](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ac9529216d344a1930497af96575ef7&_e=t361by2cQ5i_pkSZGcSATfBqEZ23jmi4jpgGqfsTzydv6qesRaMTfE_t19AaGLP98oDfnjmzGHk7omKYBEL1JAsekwpgP4DUo5q4AaF3IVFHuYIo_HR8cNrInpVFeasBsd0yjLaC14qFSDcb3M8YzvZui0_FlsQml9qQR5ihcm5ZrNMynU6tLNjRIDB2cWQ1hijlaDHS4nhv0TvU7H0L3MOeY3pFDJutY2agzmmnIFOj49bD5UeZTQBHp-eHv0m8P9K-7xs8wOfLwGlkJsvJMO7gR3JoWnluC-0Yw4fvNkIRMfcSJr9U5NZRlb_j_918jwP1HgrhaNK_09R4LPXRj0HYpOG7v4MPhYZ5mx_DPyVM_53zkCP22m42840tebdTAl0eflHSH_-ZOR49bpVtngZi33ei700MN6DmSuJMOHJNMcdMKGYPcCebpkgm_dwOv1dKGGe1kbgzchfoWiIukQ%3D%3D)** as sites open.
[**FIND A TESTING SITE NEAR YOU**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ac9529216d344a1930497af96575ef7&_e=t361by2cQ5i_pkSZGcSATfBqEZ23jmi4jpgGqfsTzydv6qesRaMTfE_t19AaGLP98oDfnjmzGHk7omKYBEL1JAsekwpgP4DUo5q4AaF3IVFHuYIo_HR8cNrInpVFeasBsd0yjLaC14qFSDcb3M8YzvZui0_FlsQml9qQR5ihcm5ZrNMynU6tLNjRIDB2cWQ1hijlaDHS4nhv0TvU7H0L3MOeY3pFDJutY2agzmmnIFOj49bD5UeZTQBHp-eHv0m8uYMGBx5Z3ezMHkxPWlO7ivY-cyMoWTFp1iI3_3zQr7EFm-XgMr0Q7c452oCI4kfvpJRC6pqyEsGQjAn0jOWkrRc2WjPjKPGFoYfrmcoAJzMfaXtyJLz2VPRONNW6_2iw6wYxrERqofisXJtv5rXMdFS4zvw40vgiVXYjJ4eKUD7nvyyjoTJSjSYX8T8IsUsp9a4daWRnwL4Hxfi6PXbErg%3D%3D)
This additional testing capacity will supplement state-sponsored OptumServe sites – which since May have already tested 284,000 Hoosiers.

Why is this a big deal?

Well, first, as Governor Holcomb says, it’s all about teamwork. And this additional testing capacity **wouldn’t be possible without partnerships with communities** – and between communities, as local health departments work hard to keep their residents healthy.

And second, as testing capacity continues to expand, more Hoosiers can easily get tested – and that means we can continue to slow the spread, **and that means we can continue to keep our state open!**

Together, your actions are making the difference – we see it all across the state. So continue to keep up the great work, and if you feel sick, check out one of Indiana’s **[many new COVID-19 testing sites here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ac9529216d344a1930497af96575ef7&_e=t361by2cQ5i_pkSZGcSATfBqEZ23jmi4jpgGqfsTzydv6qesRaMTfE_t19AaGLP98oDfnjmzGHk7omKYBEL1JAsekwpgP4DUo5q4AaF3IVFHuYIo_HR8cNrInpVFeasBsd0yjLaC14qFSDcb3M8YzvZui0_FlsQml9qQR5ihcm5ZrNMynU6tLNjRIDB2cWQ1hijlaDHS4nhv0TvU7H0L3MOeY3pFDJutY2agzmmnIFOj49bD5UeZTQBHp-eHv0m8D-ufbbRtFc1Zv5gawj3EQIc6ntEh6Zym3korjeGh4xpwubYAL8QNk5FcRM7yj9L9kMa2eqSWbx0MAa0ze7l5fO1j_1FSmeP9CA8NBZXtlMc94gYByLSCWXGz5__PesFeXs4yTkWjXlP9m6LTtBZQMuf4ZScC3LoXpVZQpk3vlLMcduTtt7vri8foGjmsY9SyYgXemj43ovpORJ9e8sYx-Q%3D%3D)**

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Hi, my name is Sara, and I am a Field Director for Team Ronchetti! I am working with Mark and our team to make sure we reach every targeted voter in the state of New Mexico. We still need more team members to help us work the phones, safely go door-to-door, distribute yard signs and organize virtual meet-ups. Time is flying by and every voter we contact is one step closer to ensuring we defeat Ben Ray Lujan in November. or on the button below to sign up to become a campaign team member! No experience is required! Whether you can only pitch in a few hours a month or an entire weekend - any help you can give WILL MAKE A DIFFERENCE. | Thank you for the support you have provided this campaign. I hope you’ll jump in and commit to actively support Mark and his New Mexico first campaign! Sara Regional Field Director Mark Ronchetti for US Senate P.S. Let me cut to the chase -- the mob wants Joe Biden to be president because they know he’ll let them get away with anything. Right now, Washington Democrats are 100% focused on lining the pockets of the ANTIFA thugs destroying our cities. That’s why my father needs strong representatives like Jim Banks in Washington. Jim is standing strong and immediately halting all taxpayer money from going to the violent members of ANTIFA who have been arrested and convicted. Jim is leading the charge in Congress to prohibit anyone who participated in violence or looting during protests from receiving any coronavirus aid. Jim is exactly what we need in Washington. He’s a veteran, father, proud Hoosier, and strong supporter of our President. He’s fighting to hold the ANTIFA mob accountable and stop the destruction of our cities. I’m fighting to send Jim back to Washington, but I need your help. Jim is fighting hard to STOP the mob, so will you join me in fighting for our values and Jim? My father needs Jim to Keep America Great. Will you join me in supporting Jim? Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: See President Trump’s 20 additions to his Supreme Court list!
body:
The President announced 20 additions to his list of qualified potential Supreme Court nominees yesterday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9769dabb9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 10, 2020
---
| | |
# **See President Trump’s 20 additions to his Supreme Court list!**

**The President announced** 20 additions to his list of qualified potential Supreme Court nominees yesterday. The 20 men and women he named are committed to the American ideal of impartial rule of law—a value that makes our country exceptional.

**“Apart from matters of war and peace,** the nomination of a Supreme Court justice is the most important decision an American President can make,” President Trump said.

**🎬** [**President Trump adds 20 great legal minds to his Supreme Court list**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e540462fd7&e=3ee4985eea)

**Filling a vacancy** on the Supreme Court is a decision that shapes America’s future for generations. President Trump wants judges who will preserve our Constitution _as written_ —not subject it to their whims or policy preferences.

**“In the recent past** , many of our most treasured freedoms, including religious liberty, free speech, and the right to keep and bear arms, have been saved by a single vote on the United States Supreme Court,” President Trump said.

**The new names** on President Trump’s list include distinguished Federal judges as well as legislators with a long history of fighting for our Constitution, such as Sen. Ted Cruz of Texas and Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas.

📖 [**READ: Additions to President Trump’s Supreme Court List**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35ff22afda&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [**WATCH: Record numbers of Federal judges confirmed!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=247f57d69f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Ivanka Trump visits Farmers to Families Food Box site in North Carolina**

**When the pandemic struck,** the Trump Administration went to work quickly designing a program to protect the food security of vulnerable American families. The result was the Department of Agriculture’s Farmers to Families Food Box program.

**Today, ****Ivanka Trump and ****Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue **traveled to Raleigh to visit the North Carolina State Farmers Market. The market accepts Electronic Benefit Transfer (EBT) cards that use government funds to help those most in need—another effort by this Administration to connect fresh produce from local farmers to low-income families.

**“With over 100 million meals** delivered to date, the Farmers to Families Food Box Program continues to serve and innovate in remarkable ways to feed our nation’s most vulnerable,” Ms. Trump said. “By making this technology available through USDA, we are enabling those most in need access to fresh, locally sourced meat, dairy, and produce for their families.”

**President Trump announced** an additional $1 billion for the program in August.

📖 [**How President Trump took action to protect America’s food supply!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82759a2d2c&e=3ee4985eea)****
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks on judicial appointments** | September 9, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc23d2b5c5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c436bcc66&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0ae800a478)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Bill Olson
subject: I'm a vet. I know the truth.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, with my sons also serving in the armed forces! I will not let the media's concocted lies about President Trump run over the truth about his support for our military!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

The most consistent supporters of the President has been soldiers and vets like me- and it's easy to understand why.

President Trump has been very good to us!

The President has given our men and women in uniform raises every year he has been in office. He has also donated his salary, several times, to military and veteran causes.

There is no one who follows politics who seriously thinks the President holds veterans and our military in anything but the highest regard! After all... he hasn't started any new wars, first President in a long while to say that!

To make matters worse, the far-Left and their media allies lied boldfaced in saying a wounded Marine called Trump a liar when he had NOT:

The original story published by the Atlantic cited four anonymous sources claiming to have firsthand knowledge of the discussion in which Trump made the controversial comments. Since then, a number of people who placed themselves in the room during the reported conversation, including former U.S. National Security Adviser John Bolton, who has a rocky past with Trump, have stepped forward to deny that the president ever made those disparaging remarks. Henline said he believes the story to be false.

“I really believe the president didn't say this," Henline said. "There’s been anonymous sources and other sources in the room that aren’t necessarily friends with the president or believe in his ways, but they're still not gonna slam him and make up this rumor and keep it spreading. And so with that said, I don't think he really said this."

Although many doubt the veracity of the story, Henline believes it was successful in its intent to turn veterans against the president.

“Them taking that well-recognized photo and using it for their agenda and changing veterans' minds, thinking the president talks to them like that is ridiculous," Henline said.

Here's the doctored meme that Henline says is NOT true:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

Thank you for standing up for the truth, Mr. Henline!

Of course President Trump believes him to be a hero- he invited him to the White House and decorated him for his valor and service in the military!

Trump visits Walter Reed Hospital every week to check up on wounded soldiers- and importantly, he doesn't create more of them by getting us into more wars!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

It is abundantly clear- the Fake News Media is an appendage of the extreme Left and actively hates us. You shouldn't be able to lie about anyone and hide behind made-up "anonymous" sources. This is what Americans hate about the media!

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the media and I'll fight for our veterans, like President Trump has.

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The media openly mocks us and thinks we have to swallow it! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, so we can toss these people from office! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.7ASswX1F6OuRU&b=gPJJnapPrVFPFZ4ATp0opg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: What people say to my husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa2375/1323440169/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

There's a Purple Heart emblem on my license plate. More than once, folks have kindly stopped to say thank you for serving -- but they direct it to my husband. He politely corrects them. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa2374/1323440169/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200910.3nd__2076__&amount=10")
---
**I'm used to people underestimating me.** The Washington establishment underestimated me when I took them on to open military jobs to women. Now Sen. Cornyn is underestimating me and my team. He knows he's in trouble -- he wouldn't be calling in his allies to bail him out otherwise -- but he doesn't know just how much trouble he's in yet. He doesn't know that **[I have the support of folks like you.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa2374/1323440169/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200910.3nd__2076__&amount=10")**

Not too many people know Sen. Cornyn around here, since he's spent 18 years in Washington peddling legislative favors to the special interests in exchange for campaign cash. Those who do know him don't much like him. Texans have a sensitive BS meter, and they know that despite his three terms in the Senate, he hasn't done diddly squat for us.

**Now, I won't lie, defeating a three-term incumbent senator won't be easy.** But I've got the scars on my arm and the Purple Heart on my license plate to remind me that I've been through **tougher situations** and made it out on top. Most of all -- I have you and a grassroots army on my side. **[Will you help me take on Sen. Cornyn and his big-money donors?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa2374/1323440169/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200910.3nd__2076__&amount=10")**
\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa2374/1323440169/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200910.3nd__2076__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa236b/1323440169/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2076&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f60/7f51f7bc/42903eec/4efa236a/1323440169/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: We are a nation of laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Dear Peter, Let me start by saying I am honored President Trump added me to his list of potential Supreme Court nominees. But **Missouri elected me to fight for America’s heartland in the U.S. Senate** , and that is exactly what I will keep doing. Although I plan to continue serving in the Senate, the president’s faith in me and in our Constitution is encouraging.
As you would expect, Trump’s announcement had the Left seething with rage at both me and the president. They don’t want to see the president nominate anyone else to the bench, and they definitely don’t want to see Republicans holding on to our Senate majority and confirming new conservative justices. What they want is to continue the anarchy and mob rule we have seen recently. It’s why _**we need to do everything in our power to fight back.**_ [_**Help us Keep the Senate RED! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6bac3295a2e6493f8f27ad76efeba3b4&_e=xXIJy_WaoO16ckAdd7-SDYsqZcj-cfbp3JKWw22FTnlFhh0XdRNneOYLL3z-G5f7GEAFY1KrzKV24JWiMi0ZDiOftPzo9o2e1GKqlJE08c7wNkwck977qFcC_GbxbHxaW4o4fYkFAsY9fmLzK-UruqbRsggS-fGqUq7jN4l8LqhVMP8qsL7Kf9CUzcnYPjdjLOuoiZErNJPSq9HEAwohNKm0EpwjB9IwuRnQgHqKtarj5yFXeZgvVMV5QORO6wb5EwGgSrQTajePv5Ne6SypcisJKVc7LXCJS3Ev7Rxhr8SRT19N57fVnSxUf0bFfFOjo26mCFNuSfacIcLS8ptaNW4MnztRbIFQj9lmz6V_0bdL44EjM0gGCs_mhNPyvCONubzRjDO8O2kmQw0Yrj17D4lBFSG7tdNTua0vlC9dR9M%3D) We have seen riots, burning, looting, and chaos rain down on some of our largest cities over the past couple of months. This is abhorrent. We are a nation of law and order, no matter what Liberals want us to believe. I stand firmly with the president's message: _**These cities must be brought under control so no more lives are put in danger!**_ **Our government’s first job is to keep Americans safe from harm.** Those who do not take this seriously should resign. We know these "protests" are no longer peaceful demonstrations. Local and state elected officials must restore order. The Left has aggravated their base to commit this chaos – Nancy Pelosi and her gang must be held accountable. **Please stand with me if you believe that our nation has a right to enforce our laws!** [**_DONATE HERE_ to Support Law and Order**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6bac3295a2e6493f8f27ad76efeba3b4&_e=xXIJy_WaoO16ckAdd7-SDYsqZcj-cfbp3JKWw22FTnlFhh0XdRNneOYLL3z-G5f7GEAFY1KrzKV24JWiMi0ZDiOftPzo9o2e1GKqlJE08c7wNkwck977qFcC_GbxbHxaW4o4fYkFAsY9fmLzK-UruqbRsggS-fGqUq7jN4l8LqhVMP8qsL7Kf9CUzcnYPjdjVhRKVvnYHNZ3gZXMMOyW2ssN6wnA7OreKBAgLlpfeqGhdISVTA2OkffHAfiwutr_lLAWHZbkPabeRvh87JOxuJom3P9k4l3Y_9CsztHjVkTZT5vkklh3afbKdluuF4HLg22fIv9iZX1JvRM2q3UFJyQ-oaF0Mr2K1XHdozx9x4-PNGdJ-Goqjo8tJ83HPPbFkhlgBV1QY3sijLQgBiVM-_0KMABw7rSJHvNlNaPQHN4%3D) Sincerely, Josh Hawley [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6bac3295a2e6493f8f27ad76efeba3b4&_e=xXIJy_WaoO16ckAdd7-SDYsqZcj-cfbp3JKWw22FTnlFhh0XdRNneOYLL3z-G5f7GEAFY1KrzKV24JWiMi0ZDiOftPzo9o2e1GKqlJE08c7wNkwck977qFcC_GbxbHxaW4o4fYkFAsY9fmLzK-UruqbRsggS-fGqUq7jN4l8LqhVMP8qsL7Kf9CUzcnYPjdjh6WQDfEVLXfGPrB96M0Cd-gzzxvIbSE2unD44SSoRa1Y0scPlY0qKXwxOF5YezlRKaKhDgIFhWjaHmFGiElJ3ghbWaSJLlG7dVCpILDgClFgBGWe4ScPh8DhuotcAG0KsdmuDoR5kGCiwWdalHimTPXJ6YKIieqRMLkUx8rFoXi1vNWcjlwMASNjYwbZGu1p01be2HOCPXR0QfDYYp6szIXLYgm1uYs8pRyMN_GXq08%3D) | |

name: Team Warner
subject: we're asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

By now, you know that Mark Warner is up for re-election in Virginia. He's focused on connecting with voters, even during the pandemic, through virtual town halls and socially distant events. And he's working hard to make sure that every Virginian has the resources they need to make it through the coronavirus pandemic.

Mark has also spent his time in the Senate working to lower the cost of prescription drugs and make health care more affordable, expand rural broadband access, make sure our veterans and military families have the resources they need, and build an economy that works for everyone.

Mark has proven he's ready to roll up his sleeves and work hard to make the future brighter for every Virginian. Now, we need your help to make sure that he wins re-election and can protect the progress we've made in Virginia. **[_Will you give Mark Warner your personal endorsement in his campaign for the U.S. Senate?_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dafb/53d9897e/55f8b6ac/1c88091f/3145709767/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-endorse")** Nothing in this race is guaranteed -- Mark won his race in 2014 by less than 1%, and he's not taking anything for granted. That's why we're collecting personal endorsements to show support for Mark in every part of the Commonwealth.

Thank you for supporting Mark!

-- Team Warner

name: Laura Loomer
subject: NEW AD: Keep the change
body:
What did they expect? I’ve spent years rattling the left with my videos as a journalist. And I’m not stopping as a candidate.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184802-c1c7990ad3-dd01672f59)
Patriot,

Our Senior Citizens need a break.

They’ve worked hard their entire lives and paid into the Social Security System.

And MANY seniors are still working through their retirement years to make ends meet.

Americans who are 75 and older have the fastest “returning to work” rate among Senior Citizens.

If you do the math, a married couple earning a “living wage” of $40,873 in Florida (including their Social Security benefits) will have taxes applied to 68% of their Social Security checks!

**That’s obscene, and it needs to end.**

And it’s why as a member of Congress, **I support tax-free Social Security for our Seniors!**

Watch our newest campaign ad here:

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184802-c1c7990ad3-dd01672f59)
This is a no-brainer.

As Democrats scream about “living wages” and seriously consider handing monthly paychecks to millennial non-workers **and illegal aliens** as a new entitlement, our Seniors’ needs are ignored.

We hand them back minimal returns from a life-long investment that doesn’t even come close to matching stock market rates – and then we tax that income?

It’s wrong!

Help me get the word out to Senior Citizens in my district to show them they have an alternative to my radical Democrat opponent, Lois Frankel – who has ignored them for EIGHT YEARS!

Every two years – if Lazy Lois even bothers to campaign – she runs as a champion for our Seniors. But what has she done?

**Nothing!**

Lazy Lois has backed a job-killing $15 an hour minimum wage, and supports efforts to give free health care to illegal aliens -- but hasn’t even CONSIDERED giving back Seniors the money they earned and were already taxed on with EVERY paycheck they received!

Lois Frankel also endorsed Joe Biden, who in 1983 was the deciding vote on the 50% tax on Social Security checks!

I’m going in on day one with a plan that will ease the burden on our seniors and give them a few thousand more dollars in their pockets to pay bills, fund visits to their grandchildren, or give them a much-deserved, more comfortable life.

[All I need is your help to get to Washington.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184802-c1c7990ad3-dd01672f59)

**[DONATE $10 TO AIR THIS AD TO 400 SENIORS](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184802-c1c7990ad3-dd01672f59).

[DONATE $25 TO AIR THIS AD TO 1,000 SENIORS](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184803-62342bba86-dd01672f59).

[DONATE $50 TO AIR THIS AD TO 2,000 SENIORS](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184804-9036782c1a-dd01672f59).

[DONATE $100 TO AIR THIS AD TO 4,000 SENIORS!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-392423-924646-5184805-bc580d25a3-dd01672f59)**
Let’s win this and help me replace Lois Frankel.

Because the only thing Lazy Lois has done for Florida’s Seniors is exploit them for their vote.

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465

Lazy Lois has backed a job-killing $15 an hour minimum wage, and supports efforts to give free health care to illegal aliens -- but hasn’t even CONSIDERED giving back Seniors the money they earned and were already taxed on with EVERY paycheck they received! Lois Frankel also endorsed Joe Biden, who in 1983 was the deciding vote on the 50% tax on Social Security checks! I’m going in on day one with a plan that will ease the burden on our seniors and give them a few thousand more dollars in their pockets to pay bills, fund visits to their grandchildren, or give them a much-deserved, more comfortable life. . . . Let’s win this and help me replace Lois Frankel. Because the only thing Lazy Lois has done for Florida’s Seniors is exploit them for their vote. Thank you again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. The COVID-19 pandemic has devastated our country in countless ways, and the situation is dire here in Mississippi. **We’ve all made sacrifices to fight this pandemic — but Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith has not.** In March, Cindy Hyde-Smith said this crisis would be over in two weeks. She then stalled a bill with hospital funding, voted to take money away from unemployed workers while our unemployment rate doubled, and took off for summer recess, all without providing any additional relief for those struggling. [**That’s why we launched our urgent new ad — now airing all across Mississippi.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19101227/249502234/457756123?refcode=em-200910ia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjE5YzE2OS1lMWYzLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTOF6GpiV3hkjPOotguWmQcXHe9h4lQZrz3Vq6UgSWM=) **[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/espy-adlaunch2?refcode=em-200910ia)** The situtation doesn't end there, unfortunately.
